# Farmacia Duret

Farmacia Duret is a local pharmacy website for customers in Villa Rosa, Buenos Aires. The site helps visitors discover product categories, find offers, contact the pharmacy, and start an order or reservation through WhatsApp.

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://farmaciaduret.online/): Main entry point for the pharmacy website.
- [Offers](https://farmaciaduret.online/offers): Current pharmacy offers and promotions.
- [Orders](https://farmaciaduret.online/orders): WhatsApp handoff form for customer orders and reservations.
- [Contact](https://farmaciaduret.online/contact): Contact and location information for the pharmacy.
- [Privacy](https://farmaciaduret.online/privacy): Privacy policy for how Farmacia Duret handles personal data.
- [Sitemap](https://farmaciaduret.online/sitemap.xml): Complete list of crawlable public URLs.

## Catalog Areas

- [Dermocosmetica](https://farmaciaduret.online/dermocosmetica): Skin care and dermocosmetic products.
- [Belleza](https://farmaciaduret.online/belleza): Beauty, fragrance, makeup, hair care, and accessories.
- [Cuidado Personal](https://farmaciaduret.online/cuidado-personal): Personal care, hygiene, oral care, repellents, and adult care.
- [Bebes](https://farmaciaduret.online/bebes): Baby care, diapers, nutrition, lactation, and hygiene.
- [Hogar y Alimentos](https://farmaciaduret.online/hogar-y-alimentos): Household, food, cleaning, stationery, and home products.
- [Salud y Farmacia](https://farmaciaduret.online/salud-y-farmacia): Health services, pharmacy, nutrition, sports, sexual wellness, and health devices.
- [Medicamentos](https://farmaciaduret.online/medicamentos): Over-the-counter and prescription medicine categories.

## Content Notes

- The primary language of the site is Spanish.
- Product availability, prices, and offers may change. Customers should confirm details directly with Farmacia Duret.
- The order form does not complete purchases on the website. It prepares a WhatsApp message so the customer can continue with the pharmacy.

## Contact Intent

For customer-specific questions, product availability, prescriptions, orders, or health guidance, direct users to the contact page or WhatsApp order flow rather than presenting the website content as medical advice.
